en: The Bob Balaban storyline on Seinfeld is creepy as f***, my stomach turns when I see that goofy little worm.
ko: 그 우스꽝스러운 벌레를 보면 속이 울렁거려.

en: I want to pee in Sarah Silverman's face, no reason behind it.
ko: 사라 실버맨의 얼굴에 오줌 싸고 싶어.

en: Whatever, Tom Hanks is a whiner, oh boo hoo, so you have a tropical island all to yourself.
F*** you, I have a turtle sandbox, b***h.
ko: 나는 거북이 모래상자가 있어, 이 자식아.

en: My mom thinks that Joseph Gordon-Levitt looks like a Q-tip.
Ben Addict Cumberbatch, what a d***head.
ko: 벤 애딕트 컴버배치. 정말 바보 같아.

en: Rob Lowe looks like skin cancer.
